retrieved_result: THE BASICS \"Q: What is Mystery Science Theater 3000? A: It was a unique comedy television program. Q: Was? Isn't it still being shown on TV? A: No. The only way you can enjoy the series now is on home video and DVD. Q: What is its broadcast history? A: It first aired as a local program on KTMA-TV, a local UHF\"
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Mystery Science Theater 3000, not related to TikTok trends for 2024.

history.title: THE BASICS
history.description: "Q: What is Mystery Science Theater 3000? A: It was a unique comedy television program. Q: Was? Isn't it still being shown on TV? A: No. The only way you can enjoy the series now is on home video and DVD. Q: What is its broadcast history? A: It first aired as a local program on KTMA-TV, a local UHF
